commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Codex doctor route repair so legacy `openai-codex/*` migrations preserve explicit non-default `agentRuntime` pins across agent model maps, provider-level policy, and provider catalog model policy, with regression coverage and a small live-gateway test helper typing adjustment.

PR surface: Source +240, Tests +574. Total +814 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The source PR and linked follow-up supplied before/after live-output matrix proof for the reported doctor repair path, and this branch adds regression tests that exercise the same config rewrite and runtime resolution paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the clean exact head has no blocking findings and can proceed through the existing armed automerge path if required checks remain green.

target.title: fix(doctor): preserve explicit agentRuntime pin during codex model migration [AI-assisted]
